Find Us

7 Branches.
5 States.

Walk into any TECIL Solar location and receive the same product quality, technical depth, and customer service. Our branches are staffed with trained engineers — not just sales people.

Where to Find Us

Our branches stock full product ranges and are staffed with certified engineers. No appointment needed — walk in during business hours or call ahead.

Remote Enquiries

Not Near a Branch? No Problem.

We serve clients across Nigeria, including locations without a nearby branch. Contact us by phone or WhatsApp — our technical team can advise remotely, and we can arrange delivery and installation to your site.

Call HQ Direct 0803 713 5545
WhatsApp Us Fastest response
Get a Quote Online We respond within 24hrs
Ready to Go Solar?

Reliable Power Starts with a Single Call.

Talk to our technical team today. We'll assess your load, recommend the right system, and give you a clear, honest quote. No pressure. No nonsense.

0803 713 5545 WhatsApp Us
